title: Garden Waste Bags 90 Litre, 10 Tie Handle Large Bin Bags Refuse Sacks, Extra Thick, Made with Recycled Plastic
features: HEAVY DUTY - 10 Tie handle strong green garden waste sacks with a capacity of 90 litres.
RECYCLED PLASTIC - Made from 60% recycled materials.
STRONG - Our Garden Waste sacks are strong helping to resist punctures and tears.
DIMENSIONS - W 82cm x H 107cm, including handles. Made in the UK.

ABOUT US - The Polylina brand offers quality, service, and innovation in a range of contemporary designed disposable household products, including kitchen bin liners, gardening refuse sacks and nappy bags.
